
[source layer]
  (D-series)
    [must-fix] UF-D2 main.tex — % !TEX program = pdflatex (required: % !TEX program = lualatex (or omit the directive))
      fix: Use `% !TEX program = lualatex` (or omit the directive) — UF requires LuaLaTeX.
      see: https://github.com/YuZh98/latex2ufdissertation/blob/main/docs/uf-rules.md#uf-d2--lualatex-compiler-directive

Summary: 1 must-fix, 0 review.
